content.text: Implement password hashing for user authentication

content.thinking: I need to choose a password hashing algorithm. The options are bcrypt, argon2, and plain SHA-256. I'll go with bcrypt because it has wide ecosystem support and a tunable cost factor.

content.text: Let me implement the password hashing module.

content.thinking: For the token format I'm using JWT over opaque tokens because JWT allows stateless verification without a database lookup on every request.

content.text: I'll also set up the JWT token issuer.

content.thinking: The sky is blue today. I should make sure the tests pass before finishing. Let me run the test suite now.

content.text: Running the test suite to verify correctness.
Done. Implemented bcrypt hashing and JWT token signing. All tests pass.
